name: Nekroz Divinemirror
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>影霊衣</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ネクロス</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>神</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>魔</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ま</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>鏡</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>きょう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: During the Main Phase: Ritual Summon 1 "Nekroz" Ritual Monster from your hand or banishment, by Tributing monsters from your hand/field, and/or sending "Nekroz" monsters from your Extra Deck to the GY, whose total Levels equal or exceed its Level. During your Main Phase: You can banish this card and 1 "Nekroz" monster from your GY; add 1 "Nekroz" Spell from your Deck to your hand. You can only use each effect of "Nekroz Divinemirror" once per turn.
eff: During the Main Phase: Ritual Summon 1 "Nekroz" Ritual Monster from your hand or banishment, by Tributing monsters from your hand/field, and/or sending "Nekroz" monsters from your Extra Deck to the GY, whose total Levels equal or exceed its Level. During your Main Phase: You can banish this card and 1 "Nekroz" monster from your GY; add 1 "Nekroz" Spell from your Deck to your hand. You can only use each effect of "Nekroz Divinemirror" once per turn.

action: Sends from your Extra Deck to your Graveyard for Ritual Summon
summoning: Ritual Summons the player's banished monsters
banished: Banishes itself from Graveyard for cost
